meaning: n.依靠,信赖,从属,从属物,属国,属地
examples: Their aim is to reduce people's dependency on the welfare state.
But social workers say that this has created a culture of dependency, particularly in urban areas.
But dependency on a network suggests possibilities of being harmed easily.
Donor dependency, down 1%, calculates the fraction of the gifts needed to break even.
Yes, you can have too much welfare and too much dependency on the state.
